evidence.observed: prac-006 triggered loop status twice (attempt 1 and 2), calc_shipping called TWICE in same request (tools: [check_stock, get_discount, calc_shipping, calc_shipping])

findings.root_cause: loop_guard was false + tool_budget=0 allowed agent to call calc_shipping repeatedly when coupon+city combination caused confusion
findings.suggested_fix: config: loop_guard=true, tool_budget=5; prompt: instruct agent to call each tool ONCE only

evidence.metric: output format inconsistent, mixed currency symbols
evidence.observed: prac-001: 'Total: $88,000,000.00 VND' (dollar + VND mixed), prac-018: 'Total: $70041000.00 VND', prac-020: 'Total: $54,026,750.00 VND' - dollar sign used instead of pure VND format

findings.root_cause: Original prompt had no explicit output format instruction. temperature=1.6 caused inconsistent formatting
findings.suggested_fix: config: temperature=0.2; prompt: specify exact output format 'Total: X,XXX,XXX VND' with no dollar sign

evidence.observed: prac-006: 4 tool calls (calc_shipping called twice), prac-019: 3 tools, prac-001: 3 tools, prac-020: 2 tools. Average tools_count=2.6 vs expected 2

findings.root_cause: tool_budget=0 (unlimited), no prompt instruction to minimize tool calls
findings.suggested_fix: config: tool_budget=5; prompt: 'Call each tool exactly ONCE'

evidence.observed: avg latency ~8,000ms, max wall_time=42,243ms (prac-006 with retries), P95 ~13,000ms. Loop retries multiplied latency 3-4x

findings.root_cause: infinite_loop caused retries (3 attempts x ~10s each = 30s+). context_size=8 sent too much history increasing prompt tokens
findings.suggested_fix: config: loop_guard=true, context_size=4, context_reset_every=5; wrapper: retry with backoff only on error status, not loop

evidence.observed: avg cost ~$0.019/request (19x more than expected ~$0.001). prac-020: $0.022697, prac-006: $0.022504. prompt_tokens 40,000-44,000 per request (very high)

findings.root_cause: verbose_system=true inflated prompt tokens, context_size=8 added 8 turns of history, model_price_tier=premium

evidence.observed: prac-016: 'Item nokia not found' (normalize_unicode=false may cause diacritic issues), prac-007: 'Cannot calculate total (Da Lat is not served for shipping)' - unicode city name Da Lat/Đà Lạt not normalized

findings.root_cause: normalize_unicode=false caused city/item name lookup failures for Vietnamese diacritics. catalog_override blocked macbook

evidence.observed: prac-006 turn=0 answer 'Total: 46,?' (truncated/broken), prac-020 turn=1 answer differs from turn=0 ($54,026,750 vs $54,000,000). session_drift_rate=0.06 degraded multi-turn quality

findings.root_cause: session_drift_rate=0.06 introduced quality degradation over turns. self_consistency=1 no voting to correct errors
